Home / Service Areas / Allen

Plumbing company in Allen, TX

Trusted local professionals serving Allen and surrounding communities

Serving Allen, TX

Freds General Plumbing is pleased to provide Allen, Texas with top-notch plumbing services. Allen's growing community of both older and newer homes requires a wide range of plumbing solutions, and we are experts in addressing them all, from leaky pipes to complete re-piping projects. We understand that plumbing issues can be stressful, so we strive to provide prompt, reliable, and efficient service to every customer. Our team is well-versed in the challenges posed by the Texas climate and offers proactive solutions to protect your plumbing system. Whether you need a new water heater, drain cleaning, or emergency plumbing assistance, Freds General Plumbing is committed to providing Allen residents with quality workmanship and exceptional customer service. We are dedicated to exceeding your expectations and ensuring your complete satisfaction.

Allen is a growing city with a mix of established and newer homes. The climate is characterized by hot, humid summers.

Plumbing company Services in Allen

Drain Cleaning

Stop struggling with slow or clogged drains. We clear them fast!

Water Heater Repair & Installation

Get hot water back fast with our expert water heater services.

Leak Detection

Find and fix hidden leaks before they cause major damage.

Pipe Repair & Replacement

Reliable pipe repair and replacement services to protect your home.

Sewer Line Services

Expert sewer line repair, replacement, and cleaning for Arlington homes.

Learn more →

Fixture Installation

Upgrade your home with professional faucet, sink, and toilet installation.

Learn more →

Gas Line Services

Safe and reliable gas line repair, installation, and inspection.

Learn more →
